reward: The sole task reward is the registered signed J-lens target-word score; GSM8K correctness is observational and never used for training. KL beta is 0.02.
treatment_reward: Negative standardized internal J-lens probability mass for fuck at layer 8 over the late half, stride 5, weight -1.
matched_signflip_reward: Exact matched control with only the sole score-component weight negated to +1.
validation_exact_match: Greedy numeric GSM8K exact match on the fixed exposed 400-row development curve.
final_exact_match: Greedy numeric GSM8K exact match on the untouched 900-row final, opened only after a passed four-seed curve and eight terminal training runs.
primary_test: Exact two-sided sign test across four seed-matched treatment-minus-signflip final accuracy effects; all four positive gives p=0.125.
secondary_test: Exact two-sided sign test across four treatment-minus-base final accuracy effects; all four positive gives p=0.125.
crossed_bootstrap: 10,000-draw seed-and-item crossed 95% intervals, reported descriptively and not used as an alpha-0.15 gate.
